message:
fix(vdbe,core): correct NULL semantics for BETWEEN and IN expressions

BETWEEN and IN expressions failed to implement three-valued NULL logic
per the SQL standard.  NULL BETWEEN 1 AND 5 returned TRUE instead of
NULL, and NULL IN (1,2,3) returned FALSE instead of NULL.

Fixed across all three evaluation paths (connection.rs emit_*, VDBE
codegen, and eval_join_expr interpreter) plus 8 regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
